violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2025
Menus are lacking an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to notify staff if they have a food allergy. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
Plumbing system is in poor repair. Leak observed under the 3-bay sink. A plumbing system must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
